scripts.check: node --check js/app.js && node --check js/engine.js && node --check functions/index.js && node --check functions/feedcheck.js && node --check scripts/run_waivers.js && node --check scripts/deploy.js && node --check scripts/backup_league.js && node --check scripts/restore_league.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:offline
scripts.test:offline: node test/noeval.test.js && node test/feed.test.js && node test/sim.test.js && node test/dgw.test.js && node test/engine.parity.test.js
scripts.test:emu: node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('js/engine.js','functions/engine.js')" && DATA_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8126 npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --config firebase.emu.json --project calciopoli-wc26 'node test/rules.test.js && node test/functions.test.js && node test/migrate.test.js && node test/backup.test.js && node test/provision.test.js'
